# Business Rules Checklist: Phase 5 - HR Business Logic Improvements

**Purpose**: Validate that Phase 5 HR business-rule requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and ready for planning
**Created**: 2026-06-03
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all five user stories traceable to at least one functional requirement and one measurable success criterion? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK002 Are vacation submission rules complete across overlap, employee status, past dates, notice period, working-day calendar, and balance validation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001-FR-009]
- [x] CHK003 Are vacation review rules complete across reviewer eligibility, self-approval prevention, review audit data, allowed transitions, balance restoration, and deletion limits? [Completeness, Spec §FR-010-FR-013A]
- [x] CHK004 Are employee lifecycle rules complete across status transitions, termination side effects, soft deletion, visibility, login identity retention, and access revocation? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014-FR-023]
- [x] CHK005 Are trip requirements complete enough to define requesting-employee traceability, active-employee eligibility, and invalid date handling? [Completeness, Spec §FR-024-FR-026]
- [x] CHK006 Are department employee-count requirements complete for active, terminated-visible, and soft-deleted-excluded employee profiles? [Completeness, Spec §FR-027, Spec §SC-009]
- [x] CHK007 Are out-of-scope boundaries explicit enough to prevent Phase 6 dependency-registration cleanup and Phase 7 RBAC/audit/dashboard features from entering Phase 5? [Boundary, Spec §FR-030, Spec §Assumptions]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK008 Is "active employee" defined consistently enough for vacation submission, trip submission, and duplicate-email requirements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-020, Spec §FR-025]
- [x] CHK009 Is "three full working days" unambiguous for notice-period counting, including excluded boundary days and weekend days? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK010 Is vacation date overlap specified unambiguously for same-start, same-end, and boundary-touching date ranges? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK011 Is "record a warning" for cross-department manager assignments defined with enough detail for an objective requirement? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK012 Is "normal employee results" defined clearly enough to identify every employee-facing result set affected by termination and soft deletion? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-022]
- [x] CHK013 Is "historical reporting" scoped clearly enough to avoid implying Phase 7 reporting/audit features? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-021-FR-023, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK014 Are "authenticated employee" and "authorized user" used consistently for vacation review and pending-request deletion requirements? [Terminology, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-010A, Spec §FR-013A]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK015 Do termination access-revocation requirements align with soft-deleted login-identity retention requirements without contradiction? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016A, Spec §FR-023]
- [x] CHK016 Do pending-only hard deletion requirements align with review audit retention and approved-request cancellation requirements? [Consistency, Spec §FR-012-FR-013A]
- [x] CHK017 Does the terminal `Terminated` status rule coexist clearly with the separate stronger soft-deletion lifecycle action? [Consistency, Spec §FR-014-FR-015, Spec §FR-021-FR-022]
- [x] CHK018 Does active-only duplicate-email handling align with retained terminated and soft-deleted employee profiles? [Consistency, Spec §FR-020, Spec §FR-022]
- [x] CHK019 Do authentication compatibility requirements remain consistent with the explicit Phase 5 behavior change that terminated and soft-deleted employees lose access? [Consistency, Spec §FR-023, Spec §FR-029]
- [x] CHK020 Are employee-count requirements consistent with terminated-visible and soft-deleted-hidden employee lifecycle rules? [Consistency, Spec §FR-022, Spec §FR-027, Spec §SC-009]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK021 Do success criteria cover every clarified decision from the 2026-06-03 clarification session? [Traceability, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK022 Are warning-recording outcomes for cross-department manager assignments objectively measurable? [Measurability, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK023 Are balance-adjustment success criteria measurable for first approval, approved-to-rejected cancellation, and repeated invalid transitions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK024 Are access-revocation success criteria measurable for both new sign-ins and existing authenticated sessions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007, Spec §SC-007A]
- [x] CHK025 Are department count success criteria measurable after creation, movement, termination, and soft deletion without needing Phase 7 reporting features? [Measurability, Spec §SC-009]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK026 Are primary, alternate, and exception scenarios documented for vacation submission, review, cancellation, and deletion? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK027 Are employee lifecycle scenarios documented for active-to-suspended, active-to-terminated, suspended-to-active, suspended-to-terminated, terminal terminated updates, and soft deletion? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-014-FR-023]
- [x] CHK028 Are trip scenarios documented for active, suspended, terminated, missing, soft-deleted, past-date, and non-working-date cases? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 4, Spec §FR-024-FR-026]
- [x] CHK029 Are current-session rejection scenarios documented for terminated and soft-deleted employees, not only new login attempts? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-016A, Spec §FR-023]
- [x] CHK030 Are recovery or rollback requirements documented or explicitly deferred for multi-step state changes involving balance updates, audit retention, access revocation, and vacation auto-rejection? [Gap, Recovery Flow]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK031 Are weekend-boundary notice cases addressed for submissions near Friday/Saturday and Sunday start dates? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK032 Are same-status vacation and employee updates defined well enough to avoid duplicate audit, balance, or revocation side effects? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK033 Are circular manager edge cases specified for direct cycles, indirect cycles, missing managers, and long reporting chains? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-018]
- [x] CHK034 Are soft-deleted and terminated employee interactions with existing vacation requests, trips, login identities, and department counts covered consistently? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-016-FR-027]
- [x] CHK035 Are approved-request cancellation and pending-request hard deletion boundaries clear enough to prevent audit loss or duplicate balance restoration? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-012-FR-013A]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK036 Are security requirements for immediate access revocation specified without introducing manager-only authorization, RBAC, or Phase 7 role features? [Security, Spec §FR-010A, Spec §FR-016A, Spec §FR-023, Spec §FR-030]
- [x] CHK037 Are compatibility requirements for routes, cookies, claims, status codes, error codes, and unrelated public behavior clear after Phase 5's intentional business-rule changes? [Compatibility, Spec §FR-028-FR-029]
- [x] CHK038 Are audit-retention requirements limited to vacation review history and retained identity/profile associations without conflicting with deferred Phase 7 general audit logging? [Boundary, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-013A, Spec §FR-023, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK039 Are performance or scale expectations intentionally excluded or sufficiently unnecessary for Phase 5 planning? [Non-Functional, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK040 Are Phase 0-4 dependencies and Phase 6/7 exclusions documented clearly enough for implementation planning? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK041 Are data-shape assumptions for vacation balance, reviewer audit fields, termination time, soft-deletion state, and trip requester traceability clear enough for planning without embedding implementation details in the spec? [Assumption, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK042 Are existing compatibility error-code requirements aligned with new business-rule failures and existing structured error response expectations? [Consistency, Spec §FR-028]
- [x] CHK043 Is the FR/SC identifier scheme stable enough for planning and task traceability after inserting `A` suffixed requirements and criteria? [Traceability, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Success Criteria]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK044 Are terms such as "removed", "soft-deleted", "terminated", "retained", and "normal employee results" used consistently with no conflicting synonyms? [Terminology, Spec §FR-021-FR-023]
- [x] CHK045 Are there any remaining requirements that use non-measurable language such as "valid", "normal", "retained", or "historical" without enough context to guide planning? [Ambiguity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK046 Are all behavior changes explicitly tied to Phase 5 business-rule outcomes so they do not appear to violate the public compatibility requirement? [Conflict, Spec §FR-028-FR-030]

## Notes

- This checklist validates the quality of the Phase 5 requirements, planning, task, data-model, and API-contract artifacts. It does not verify implementation behavior.
- `plan.md`, `tasks.md`, `data-model.md`, and `contracts/api-contract.md` now exist and were included in the 2026-06-03 remediation review.
- All checklist items were reviewed before implementation. No items were marked N/A; documentation gaps found during review were remediated in the Spec Kit artifacts before marking items complete.
